Headline: #8 Halsted Temporary Reroute at Halsted/76th
ShortDescription: #8 Halsted buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions due to, police activity near Halsted/76th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#8 Halsted buses are temporarily rerouted in both directions via Halsted, 74th, Racine, 79th and Halsted then resume their normal route due to police activity near Halsted/76th.

Allow extra travel time.
